infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Provider Workboard uses the camera to capture evidence photos and verify equipment asset codes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Provider Workboard attaches your location to captured evidence to record where service was performed.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Provider Workboard uses the accelerometer to detect rough equipment handling during a short stability check.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Provider Workboard to use your camera for evidence capture and asset verification.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Provider Workboard to attach your location to captured evidence.
